metadata.thoughts:
**Identifying strike announcement**

I need to confirm if this document is announcing a strike. The title is in Italian and mentions a "4-hour strike on December 13, 2024." The content indicates that a previously planned 24-hour national strike has been reduced to 4 hours, running from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM on that date. The article also has a date stamp of December 11, 2024, which means it is indeed announcing an upcoming strike.
